practice.task: Join employees with departments table to show each employee's department name.
practice.title: Employee Departments
practice.code:
-- TODO: Write a JOIN query
-- Tables: employees (id, name, dept_id), departments (id, dept_name)

solutionCode: SELECT e.name, d.dept_name FROM employees e JOIN departments d ON e.dept_id = d.id;
meta:
TITLE: Employee Departments
TASK: Join employees with departments to show department names.
EXPECTED_OUTPUT: Alice|Engineering
Bob|Marketing
Charlie|Engineering
HINT: Use JOIN ... ON to connect tables.

variants.label: correct
variants.code: SELECT e.name, d.dept_name FROM employees e JOIN departments d ON e.dept_id = d.id;
